languages.text: "Вы ушли, железки нас прижали знатно. Выползла тварь, у которой вместо ног что-то типа пластины. Пока я ей голову откручивал, наши закричали, что все рушится. Я отвлекся и чудище подо мной взорвалось. Очнулся уже снаружи, в шаттле. Бойцы на себе вытащили".

"After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."
languages.original_text: "Вы ушли, железки нас прижали знатно. Выползла тварь, у которой вместо ног что-то типа пластины. Пока я ей голову откручивал, наши закричали, что все рушится. Я отвлекся и чудище подо мной взорвалось. Очнулся уже снаружи, в шаттле. Бойцы на себе вытащили".

traits.locale_text: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. Some beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I got distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

The lads hauled me out on their backs."

While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

"After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

languages.text: “您走后，那些铁皮生物把我们彻底压制住了。有个怪物爬了出来，它没有腿，只有一块板状的东西。我正忙着拧掉它的脑袋呢，弟兄们就喊开了，说所有东西都在往下塌。我一分神，那该死的东西就在我身子底下炸开了。我醒过来时已经在穿梭机上了，是弟兄们把我背出来的。”
languages.original_text: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

traits.locale_text: “您走后，那些铁皮生物把我们彻底压制住了。有个怪物爬了出来，它没有腿，只有一块板状的东西。我正忙着拧掉它的脑袋呢，弟兄们就喊开了，说所有东西都在往下塌。我一分神，那该死的东西就在我身子底下炸开了。我醒过来时已经在穿梭机上了，是弟兄们把我背出来的。”

languages.text: "Siz gittikten sonra o demir yaratıklar bizi iyice kıstırdı. Bir tanesi bacakları yerine bir tür plakayla sürünerek dışarı çıktı. Ben onun kafasını koparmakla meşgulken çocuklarım, her şeyin yıkıldığını bağırmaya başladı. Dikkatim dağıldı ve o lanet şey tam altımda havaya uçtu. Dışarıda, mekikte uyandım. Çocuklar beni sırtlarında taşımış."
languages.original_text: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

traits.locale_text: "Siz gittikten sonra o demir yaratıklar bizi iyice kıstırdı. Bir tanesi bacakları yerine bir tür plakayla sürünerek dışarı çıktı. Ben onun kafasını koparmakla meşgulken çocuklarım, her şeyin yıkıldığını bağırmaya başladı. Dikkatim dağıldı ve o lanet şey tam altımda havaya uçtu. Dışarıda, mekikte uyandım. Çocuklar beni sırtlarında taşımış."

languages.text: « Après votre départ, ces créatures de fer nous attaqués. L'un de ces monstres avait des plaques à la place des jambes. J'étais occupé à lui arracher la tête quand j'ai entendu mes hommes hurler. Tout s'effondrait. Je n'ai rien vu venir, cette chose a explosé sous mes pieds. Je me suis réveillé dans la navette. Les gars m'ont porté pour me sortir de là. »
languages.original_text: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

traits.locale_text: « Après votre départ, ces créatures de fer nous attaqués. L'un de ces monstres avait des plaques à la place des jambes. J'étais occupé à lui arracher la tête quand j'ai entendu mes hommes hurler. Tout s'effondrait. Je n'ai rien vu venir, cette chose a explosé sous mes pieds. Je me suis réveillé dans la navette. Les gars m'ont porté pour me sortir de là. »

languages.text: «Después de que se marchara, esas criaturas de hierro nos asediaron por completo. Una bestia se arrastró con una especie de plancha en lugar de piernas. Mientras intentaba arrancarle la cabeza, mis muchachos empezaron a gritar que todo se caía. Me distrajeron con eso y la maldita criatura explotó justo debajo de mí. Desperté fuera, en la lanzadera. Los muchachos me sacaron de allí en brazos».
languages.original_text: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

traits.locale_text: «Después de que se marchara, esas criaturas de hierro nos asediaron por completo. Una bestia se arrastró con una especie de plancha en lugar de piernas. Mientras intentaba arrancarle la cabeza, mis muchachos empezaron a gritar que todo se caía. Me distrajeron con eso y la maldita criatura explotó justo debajo de mí. Desperté fuera, en la lanzadera. Los muchachos me sacaron de allí en brazos».

languages.text: "Nachdem Ihr weg wart, haben uns diese Eisenkreaturen ziemlich zugesetzt. Eines der Biester hatte anstelle von Beinen irgendeine Platte. Ich war gerade damit beschäftigt, ihm den Kopf wegzublasen, als meine Jungs riefen, dass alles einstürzen würde. Ich war kurz abgelenkt und das verdammte Ding ist genau unter mir explodiert. Bin draußen wieder aufgewacht, im Shuttle. Die Jungs hatten mich rausgetragen."
languages.original_text: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

Ich war gerade damit beschäftigt, ihm den Kopf wegzublasen, als meine Jungs riefen, dass alles einstürzen würde. Ich war kurz abgelenkt und das verdammte Ding ist genau unter mir explodiert. Bin draußen wieder aufgewacht, im Shuttle. Die Jungs hatten mich rausgetragen."

languages.text: 「君が去ったあと、鉄の生き物たちが我々を捕らえた。1匹の生き物が足代わりに皿のようなものを持ち、這い出てきた。その首をねじりながら、仲間たちは「すべてが崩れ落ちている」と叫んだ。気を取られて、その生き物が爆発した。目が覚めると、シャトルの外で、仲間たちが背負って運んでいた。」
languages.original_text: "After you left, those iron creatures pinned us down good. One beast crawled out with a sort of plate instead of legs. While I was busy twisting its head off, my boys started shouting that everything was coming down. I was distracted, and the damn thing blew up right under me. Woke up outside, in the shuttle. The lads hauled me out on their backs."

traits.locale_text: 「君が去ったあと、鉄の生き物たちが我々を捕らえた。1匹の生き物が足代わりに皿のようなものを持ち、這い出てきた。その首をねじりながら、仲間たちは「すべてが崩れ落ちている」と叫んだ。気を取られて、その生き物が爆発した。目が覚めると、シャトルの外で、仲間たちが背負って運んでいた。」
